entries.label: Order Food delivery or pickup
entries.note: Open restaurants for delivery or pickup.

entries.label: Map
entries.note: Live pickup navigation opened. Return keeps the accepted ride active.

entries.label: Call
entries.note: Call the captain through a masked number. Ending the call returns to this ride.

entries.label: Share
entries.note: Share live ride status with a trusted contact.

entries.label: Edit
entries.note: Review pickup instructions before saving them to the active ride.

entries.label: Cancel
entries.note: Review cancellation reason, fee and captain impact before confirming.

entries.label: Map
entries.note: Live trip map opened. Return keeps trip tracking active.

entries.label: Call
entries.note: Call the captain through a masked number.

entries.label: Share
entries.note: Share this live trip with a trusted contact.

entries.label: Add stop
entries.note: Add one stop and review the revised fare and arrival time before confirming.

entries.label: Help
entries.note: Ride help opened with safety, route and fare options.

entries.label: Approve Rs 112
entries.note: Approve the final fare and continue to the receipt.

entries.label: Issue
entries.note: Open fare support without approving a disputed amount.

entries.label: Pay
entries.note: Payment approval is the current step.

entries.label: Submit rating
entries.note: Submit the ride rating and keep support available.

entries.label: Support
entries.note: Open post-trip support.

entries.label: Share
entries.note: Share the trip receipt through an approved app or link.

entries.label: Receipt
entries.note: Receipt details opened with fare, payment method and trip reference.

entries.label: Rate
entries.note: Rating is the current step.

entries.label: Help
entries.note: Open ride help.

entries.label: Alert
entries.note: Safety reminder opened. Report an issue only when something unwanted happened.

entries.label: Report missing item
entries.note: Start a missing-item report with trip, captain and item details.

entries.label: Track
entries.note: Review the active support case and its latest status.

entries.label: Call
entries.note: Call support through the protected ride contact channel.

entries.label: Help
entries.note: Post-trip help options opened.

entries.label: P Price includes selected service Haircut, basic styling and GST included. Salon rating + shop photos verified Rs 199 locked
entries.note: Price includes the selected service and shown taxes.

entries.label: C Cancellation Free cancellation till 30 min before slot. Late/no-show rule shown before final booking. Free 30 min
entries.note: Cancellation terms opened before final booking.

entries.label: Save opportunity
entries.note: Opportunity saved to My Work.

entries.label: Camera
